delay.name: Delay
delay.description: Pause execution for a specified duration

delay_until.name: Delay Until
delay_until.description: Pause execution until a specific datetime

wait_for_condition.name: Wait For Condition
wait_for_condition.description: Wait until a condition is true or timeout expires

comment.name: Comment
comment.description: Add a comment to the process (no operation at runtime)

log_message.name: Log Message
log_message.description: Log a message at the specified log level

elapsed_time.name: Elapsed Time
elapsed_time.description: Calculate elapsed time from a start timestamp

measure_duration.name: Measure Duration
measure_duration.description: Get detailed duration breakdown from a start timestamp
